proposals.sql: SELECT * FROM schools WHERE Charter = 1 AND status_type = 'Active' AND magnet = 0;
proposals.natural_language: Show me all active charter schools that are not magnet schools.

proposals.sql: SELECT * FROM schools WHERE status_type = 'Active' AND magnet = 0 AND virtual = 'N';
proposals.natural_language: Find all active, non-magnet, non-virtual schools (physical campus schools).
